description: Ketubba. Groom: Yosef b. Neḥemya. Bride: Zuhra bt. Avraham. Signed by the cantor Yefet b. David (b. Shekhanya, active 1014–57 CE), Avraham ha-Levi b. Mulham (?), Avraham b. David, Shemuel b. Shemuel, Yeshuʿa b. Yiṣ[ḥaq], [...] b. Khalaf and [... b.] Yosef. It seems that the total payments add up to 7 dinars. (Information from CUDL and Goitein's index card.)
description_he: כתובה; חתן: יוסף בן נחמיה; כלה: זהרה בת אברהם; חתום על ידי החזן יפת בן דוד ואחרים; סך תשלומים: כנראה 7 דינרים
